## Summary

Describe the catalog, documentation, or tooling change.

## Taxonomy rationale

For catalog changes, explain the primary estimand and architectural family. Link to the source paper.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked for duplicates.
- [ ] I updated the relevant CSV and BibTeX entry.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate_catalog.py`.
- [ ] I did not add non-redistributable publisher content.
